---
name: incident-triage
description: Route production incidents through an evidence-backed review.
skill_card:
  trigger:
    - A production incident needs an initial response plan.
  exclusions:
    - Do not use for product feature planning.
  required_inputs:
    - Incident summary
  approved_tools:
    - incident-api
  expected_evidence:
    - Incident timeline
  references:
    - references/decision-checklist.md
  version: "1.2.0"
  review_by: 2026-12-01
---

# Incident Triage

Confirm the incident summary, gather the approved timeline, and record the handoff decision. Verify
the cited timeline before completing the handoff.

Use the [decision checklist](references/decision-checklist.md) before completing the handoff.
